info.title: Delivery Public Service
info.description:
Public APIs to fetch data from Janis Delivery Service

 **Last update**: 06 feb 26, 05:59 p. m.

tags.name: Delivery shipping tracking
tags.description: To see shipping tracking in real time

get.summary: Get coverage by Postal code or Coordinates
get.description:
Check if a ZIP Code / Postal Code **or** a geopoint has delivery coverage.

**Important:** One and only one of `postalCode` and `coordinates` must be sent.
Get orders with related shipping information

get.summary: Get shipping by janis tracking identifier

schema.description: The sync stats for each entity

id.description: The unique identifier of the item

dateModified.description: The date of the last modification

userCreated.description: The ID of the user who created the item

userModified.description: The ID of the user who last modified the item

Carrier.description:
A Carrier

A carrier with multiple coverage areas will be represented as multiple carriers

carrierId.description: The ID of the Carrier in Delivery Service

coverageArea.description: The details of the coverage area

slaId.description: The ID of the Shipping Type in Delivery Service

slaType.description: The code of the Shipping Type

slaName.description: The name of the Shipping Type

minDeliveryTime.description: The minimum hours required to deliver a shipping

maxDeliveryTime.description: The maximum hours available to deliver a shipping

minWeightAllowed.description: The minimum weight required to deliver a shipping

maxWeightAllowed.description: The maximum weight available to deliver a shipping

minVolumeAllowed.description: The minimum volume required to deliver a shipping

maxVolumeAllowed.description: The maximum volume available to deliver a shipping

windows.description: The windows of a scheduled carrier

warehouses.description: The warehouses related to the carrier

PostalCodeCoverageArea.description: The detail of a Postal Code coverage area

start.description: The start of the postal code range (inclusive)

end.description: The end of the postal code range (inclusive)

LinearDistanceCoverageArea.description: The detail of a Linear Distance coverage area

linearDistance.description: The maximum linear distance of the coverage area (inclusive)

PolygonCoverageArea.description: The detail of a Polygon or MultiPolygon coverage area

hasShippingCoverage.description: Indicates if there is delivery coverage for the given location

value.description:
The address of the delivery area.

> It is important that each address data is normalized and expressed with the long name.
>
> To achieve normalization, it is recommended to use the Google Maps APIs: [API Places](https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/places/web-service?hl=es-419).

number.description:
The street number represented in a range with a start and end.

> The range limits are not inclusive to exclude deliveries.
>
> **Example**: If the delivery area is unavailable from **09:00** to **10:00**, it is possible to schedule deliveries starting from **10:00**.

city.description:
The city.

> It is required if the `state` field is passed.

state.description:
The state.

> It is required if the `city` field is passed.

lat.description:
The latitude.

> It is required if the `lng` field is passed.

lng.description:
The longitude.

> It is required if the `lat` field is passed.

DeliveryAreaUnavailableWindows.description: A key-value object containing the unavailable windows for the delivery area.

additionalProperties.description:
The day of the week with the windows in which the delivery area will not be available.

> **Example**: monday, tuesday, wednesday, thursday, friday, saturday or sunday.

items.description: The unavailable windows for a given day

start.description: The start time of the intervals is in **hh:mm** (24hrs) UTC format.

end.description: The end time of the intervals is in **hh:mm** (24hrs) UTC format.

DeliveryAreaAvailabilityList.description: A list of Delivery Area Availabilities

orderIds.description: The order identifiers to announce. This must be the `id` of a [Order](/v2/service/oms#operation/getOrder)

position.description: The position in which the customer is waiting for the order

pickupCheckedIn.description: indicates if the customer announced to pick up an order

OrderReceiverList.description: A list of orders with related shippings

OrderReceiverResponse.description: The order response with related shipping data

productId.description: The ID of the product in Catalog Service

skuId.description: The ID of the SKU in Catalog Service

productReferenceId.description: The Reference ID of the product

skuReferenceId.description: The Reference ID of the SKU

eans.description: The list of EANs of the SKU

productGroups.description: The list of Product Groups of the SKU

name.description: The name of the Product Group

behaviors.description: The behaviors of the products in the group

shippingTypes.description: A list of shipping type IDs that can deliver the products. No restriction is applied if this is empty

shippingTypeCodes.description: A list of shipping type codes that can deliver the products. No restriction is applied if this is empty

preparationDaysOffset.description: The quantity of days that the products in the group need to be ready for delivery.

conditionals.description: The conditions where the product group behaviors should be considered

warehousesIds.description: A list of Warehouse IDs where the product group should be accounted for. Every warehouse is matched if this is empty.

name.description: The name of the sales channel in Commerce Service

referenceId.description: The referenceId of the sales channel in Commerce Service

shortIdentifier.description: The shortIdentifier of the sales channel in Commerce Service

start.description: This refer the schedule `start` of the shipping

end.description: This refer the schedule `end` of the shipping

ShippingTrackingReceiver.description: The information about the receiver of the shipping

firstName.description: The first name of the receiver

ShippingTrackingIsScheduled.description: Indicates if the shipping is scheduled or not

ShippingTrackingExternalUrl.description: The URL of a delivery operator external tracking URL

ShippingTrackingStatuses.description: A list of tracking status updates

date.description: The date of the tracking status change

dropoff.description: A public version of the shipping dropoff (only present when the shipping is not pickup nor drive through)

approximateLocation.description: An approximate location of the dropoff point

companyName.description: The name of the delivery company name

driverName.description: The firstname of the delivery driver

vehiclePlate.description: A redacted version of the delivery vehicle plate number

currentLocation.description: The last known location of the shipping. This may be available only if the shipping is on the way to dropoff point.

date.description: The date of the last update

rescheduleValidation.description: Indicates whether the orders associated with the shipping can be rescheduled

validationError.example: Order status "inDelivery" is not valid for rescheduling

pickupPoint.description: The information of the pickup point where the shipping should be picked up (only present when the shipping is pickup or drive through)

Simulation.description: The constraints for a simulation by shipping SLA

slaName.description: The SLA names to simulate. This must be the `title` of a [Shipping Type](/v2/service/delivery#operation/getShippingType).

items.description: The preferred shipping SLA name to simulate

dropoff.description:
The dropoff location of the shipping.

If it is required to validate the shipping options with the availability of the delivery area, it is necessary to provide the address details (`street`, `number`, `city`, `state` and `country`).

Time slots that overlap with the unavailability times of the delivery area will be excluded. [See Delivery Area Availability](/v2/service/delivery#tag/Delivery-Area-Availability).

> It is important that each address data is normalized and expressed with the long name.
>
> To achieve normalization, it is recommended to use the Google Maps APIs: [API Places](https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/places/web-service?hl=es-419).

coordinates.description:
An array with longitude and latitude of the dropoff location.

> It is required if the `postalCode` field is not passed.

postalCode.description:
The ZIP Code / Postal Code of the dropoff location.

> It is required if the `coordinates` field is not passed.

street.description:
The street of the dropoff location.

The equivalent to the `route` field in **GMaps**.

number.description:
The number of the dropoff location.

The equivalent to the `street_number` field in **GMaps**.

city.description:
The city of the dropoff location.

The equivalent to the `locality` field in **GMaps**.

> It is required if the `state` field is not passed.

state.description:
The state of the dropoff location.

The equivalent to the `administrative_area_level_1` field in **GMaps**.

> It is required if the `city` field is not passed.

country.description:
The country of the dropoff location.

The equivalent to the `country` field in **GMaps**.

allOf.description: A shipping option for express delivery

availableSaleChannels.description: The available sales channels with delivery options

id.description: The Janis internal ID of the sales channel

referenceId.description: The Janis (external) reference ID of the sales channel

dropoff.description: The dropoff location of the shipping

coordinates.description: An array with longitude and latitude of the dropoff location

postalCode.description: The ZIP Code / Postal Code of the dropoff location

externalId.description: An external ID that can be passed and will be returned in the response

carrierId.description: The Janis internal ID of the carrier

shippingType.description: The shipping type of the carrier

price.description: The price of the shipping option

allOf.description: A shipping option for express delivery

price.description: The price of the shipping option

minEstimatedDeliveryTimeInHours.description: The minimum estimated time for delivery in hours

maxEstimatedDeliveryTimeInHours.description: The maximum estimated time for delivery in hours

allOf.description: A shipping option for scheduled delivery

windows.description: The delivery windows available for the shipping option. Available for carriers with windows.

items.description: A delivery window available for the shipping option

start.description: The start of the delivery window

end.description: The end of the delivery window

price.description: The extra price for this delivery window

allOf.description: A shipping option for store pickup

price.description: The price of the shipping option

minEstimatedDeliveryTimeInHours.description: The minimum estimated time for delivery in hours

maxEstimatedDeliveryTimeInHours.description: The maximum estimated time for delivery in hours

pickupPoints.description: The pickup points allowed. Available for carriers with shipping type `storePickup`

carts.description: A list of carts to partition the order

skus.description: The SKUs that are part of the partition

shippingOptions.description: The shipping options for the cart partition

SimulationBySLAPickupPoint.description: A pickup point for store pickup delivery

referenceId.description: The Janis (external) reference ID of the Pickup Point

name.description: The friendly name of the pickup point

address.description: The formatted address of the pickup point
address.example: Av. Pres. Roque Sáenz Peña 1118, Buenos Aires

coordinates.description: An array with longitude and latitude of the pickup point

schedule.description: A list of open schedules of the pickup point

items.description: An open schedule of the pickup point

hours.description: The open ranges for the day

items.description: An open range for the day

open.description: The start time of the range

close.description: The end time of the range

stockId.description: The ID of the stock in WMS Service

skuId.description: The ID of the SKU in Catalog Service

warehouseId.description: The ID of the Warehouse in WMS Service

quantity.description: The quantity of items in stock. If product has infinite stock, this will be set as `999999999`.

hasInfiniteStock.description: Whether the SKU has infinite stock or not

carrierId.description: The ID of the Carrier in Delivery Service

dateStart.description: The date when the time slot starts

dateEnd.description: The date when the time slot ends
